roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOT FOR FORMAL BAIL HEARING AND ORDER RELEASING ON OR FILED
/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT RETURN/DEF: IS 4011,5 TODAY AND UNABLE TO COME TO COURT/X: THE COURT ORDERS THE SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED/EMTERM/X: THIS CASE WAS DISMISSED ON 03-25-21/

/CAL:HEARING ON ACM RELEASE/ACM/NTW60/LDPX:03-29-21/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO BERELEASED TO ACM ONLY WHEN BED BECOMES AVAILABLE AT ARESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ONTHE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/NALC/RX/WEAP/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REMAINWITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSD SWORN EMPLOYEE/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REMAIN IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM WHEN BEDIS AVAILABLE, PER SF PTD NOTIFICATION/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/X:THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE ORDER CREATED ON 03-09-21/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:MOTION TO DETAIN FILED BY THE PEOPLE,/X:ORDER SEALINGEXHIBITS IN SUPPORT MOTION TO DETAIL WITHOUT BAIL IS SIGNED AND FILED,/X:THE PEOPLE MAKE AN ORAL MOTION TO AMEND COUNT 1 OF THE COMPLAINT AS TO THE DATE OF THE INCIDENT/AMEND:1/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX:03-11-21 (30TH)/987,2/BAIL:100,000/SA5:JAIME CAUICHE/SA2:11014TH ST, SF, CA/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT, TO JOIN OTHER CASES AND DETENTION MOTION ON02-04-21/DOP/ /CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 02-11-21/DOP/
/CAL:TO JOIN 20011810 PRE-PX M11/LD:03-11-21/CONTD:HRG ON RELEASE ON ACM/
